name: Rendy Andika
summary: Frontend Engineer with 5+ years of experience delivering production-grade web applications across education technology, digital identity, banking, e-commerce, logistics, and enterprise operations. Specializes in React.js, Next.js, Vue.js, Nuxt.js, and TypeScript.

experience.title: Frontend Engineer
highlights: Built core learning platform serving thousands of users — course discovery, enrolments, live classes, certifications, multi-brand deployments
Developed admin panel with 40+ modules — course/user/billing, reports, gamification, surveys, whitelabel config
Built multi-tenant job portal — job listing, apply flow with resume validation, screening questions, candidate pipeline

experience.title: Frontend Engineer
highlights: Built Training Request system serving 1000+ users — 60% reduction in manual administrative overhead
Engineered reusable UI component library — 40% improvement in team velocity and 85% code reuse

experience.title: Frontend Engineer
highlights: API Playground platform — 500+ QA testers, 200+ developers, 45% faster validation cycles
OAuth SSO platform — 10,000+ monthly auth events, 99.9% uptime, <200ms latency
Document signing web app — 5,000+ documents monthly with full audit trails
Stripe & Midtrans payment integration — 99.8% transaction success rate, $2M+ annual GMV

experience.title: Frontend Developer (Freelance)
highlights: Built 4+ CMS-based web apps for enterprise clients — 99% uptime, sub-2s page loads
Logistics tracking system — 98% delivery accuracy, real-time GPS visualization

job_preferences.notes: Open to Indonesia roles if the offer fits (previously avoided due to BPJS double-employment detection). Prefer international remote or freelance contracts.
job_preferences.eligibility: WNI (Indonesian citizen), no foreign work visa. Overseas REMOTE must accept Indonesia/worldwide applicants (not region-locked, e.g. 'US only'). Overseas ON-SITE must offer visa sponsorship/relocation. Indonesia-based roles eligible normally.
